# group_vibe_workbench

- purpose: Desktop P2P collaboration workbench with zero-config local network discovery
- version: 0.1.0
- language: Rust
- ui_framework: GPUI 0.2 + gpui-component 0.5
- p2p_library: murmur (iroh-net + Automerge CRDT)

## Command Syntax

```
group_vibe_workbench launch [-n <NICKNAME>] [--width <W>] [--height <H>]
group_vibe_workbench dev --count <N>
```

## Arguments

- `launch`: Start the workbench GUI
  - `-n, --nickname <NAME>`: User display name
  - `--width <W>`: Window width in pixels
  - `--height <H>`: Window height in pixels
- `dev`: Multi-instance development mode
  - `--count <N>`: Number of instances to spawn

## Architecture

- MVC pattern (GPUI requires main-thread rendering)
- model.rs: Pure data structs (AppState, SwarmState)
- controller.rs: Async logic, swarm operations
- swarm_manager.rs: Global Swarm singleton with dedicated tokio Runtime
- shared_file.rs: File sync via Murmur CRDT + file watching (notify)
- gui/: Components, pages, Catppuccin Mocha theme

## P2P Details

- Discovery: mDNS (LocalSwarmDiscovery), auto-scan every 3s
- Sync: Automerge CRDT, conflict-free
- Election: Bully algorithm, heartbeat 2s, timeout 5s
- Storage: redb (default)
- Shared file key: `prompt_context`

## Platform Dependencies

- macOS: None (Metal via Xcode)
- Linux: libxcb-shape0-dev, libxcb-xfixes0-dev, libxkbcommon-dev
- Windows: None

## Build

```bash
cd group_vibe_workbench && cargo build --release
```

## Notes

- Not in CI (GPUI/Metal dependencies)
- Single-instance lock enforced in release mode
